subparts.text: What is source transformation technique? Explain by transforming a voltage source to a current source and vice versa.

Derive the condition of symmetry in terms of Z -parameters
What do you understand by positive real function?
What are the necessary conditions for driving point functions?

questions.question_text: Prove that maximum power is delivered from a source having internal impedance Zs, to a connected load impedance ZL, when ZL=Zs*.
Using nodal analysis, find the power dissipated in the 4 ohm resistor of the network shown in Figure. 2
The switch K, as shown in the Fig.4 is in steady state position ‘a’ for t<0. At t=0, it is shifted to position ‘b’. Find iL, for t≥0.
What is graph theory? Explain its applications with one example.
Find T parameters of the circuit shown in figure below:
What do you understand by h-parameters? Derive h-parameters for a two port network and clearly explain the procedure. Draw the equivalent circuit model.
Explain concept of poles & zeroes. Discuss restrictions on pole and zero locations for driving point functions.
Synthesize a network using Foster-I and Foster -II forms for the impedance function: 𝑍 = 𝑠
